content: buildCommandMining (src/runs/analytics/command-mining.ts, warren-8976/pl-ad0f step 7) is the pure aggregator for GET /analytics/behavior. Takes ToolEventRow[] (handler maps EventsRepo.listToolEventsForRuns rows to {runId,kind,seq,payload}). generalizeCommand collapses raw commands to a binary+subcommand signature (git/gh/sd/ml/bun etc.), using the trailing &&-segment and stripping sudo/env/flags so 'bun check:all'=='bun run check:all'. Only tool_use rows carrying payload.input.command (or payload.command) are mined; structured tools count in totals.toolUses only. is_error joins tool_result->tool_use via tool_use_id per run. retries=re-invocation of a command already failed earlier in the same run; stuckScore=retries that failed again. isOsEcoCommand flags ml/sd/gh + 'bun run check:*'. Outputs byFrequency/byFailures/byStuckScore(retries>0)/osEcoCommands/byCategory, deterministically sorted.

buildInsights (src/runs/analytics/insights.ts, warren-1788/pl-ad0f step 8) is the pure capstone aggregator for GET /analytics/behavior. Takes InsightsInput{metrics:RunMetrics, mining:CommandMining, steering?:SteeringSignals} and derives at most one typed Insight per category: highest-context-seed (topSeedsByContext[0], warning if >=2x runner-up else info), worst-success-agent (byAgent lowest successRate, only when terminal runs>=3 and rate<0.8; critical<0.5), most-failed-command (byFailures[0], failures>=2 warning / >=5 critical), most-retried-command (byStuckScore[0] stuckScore>0; >=3 critical), model-cost-outlier (byModel avg=costUsd/priced >=2x peer median, needs >=2 priced models), steering-anomaly (runsSteered/totalRuns >=0.25 warning / >=0.5 critical) and pause-anomaly (pauseTimeouts>0 critical). steering/pause skipped entirely when SteeringSignals absent. Each Insight: kind/severity(info|warning|critical)/title/detail/value/subject. Sorted critical->warning->info then fixed KIND_ORDER for determinism; clean window yields [].

TokenBreakdown (warren-18f5 / pl-d1a2): buildRunMetrics now emits tokens:{input,output,cacheRead,cacheWrite,total} on RunTotals and every RunGroupBucket. RunMetricsRow gained tokensCacheWrite (null→0). Pure-aggregation helpers tokenBreakdownOf+addTokenBreakdowns+ZERO_TOKENS added to run-metrics.ts. toMetricsRows in analytics.ts wires the new column. Tests: null→0, multi-run summation, unknown-bucket reconciliation, totals==sum-of-buckets invariant, total==sum-of-kinds invariant. Insights.test.ts RunGroupBucket stubs need the tokens field.
